retrieved_result: How much is the hourly rate Night/day for Asda and Tesco workers in E.London? Local Businesses United Kingdom London How much is the hourly rate Night/day for Asda and Tesco workers in E. London? Follow 2 answers Answers Best Answer: Tesco night shift is 7.10 per hour plus night time premium which I think is 10.05. Asda pay is 6.50 per hour and about 7.85 night shift premium.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses wages for supermarket workers and is unrelated to Docker setup or beginner guidance.
